About I-ON I-ON is a leading-edge developer and provider of asset-digitization and securitization solutions engineered to provide a secure, fast, transparent, and institutional-grade digital asset ecosystem. We specialize in digitizing documentary evidence of ownership into secure, asset-backed digital certificates, thus bringing liquidity and recognized value to a diverse array of asset classes.
